Fn::Join: Generated by the CDK for stack:

#!/bin/bash
set -xe
dnf update -y
dnf install -y git jq
curl -fsSL https://rpm.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash -
dnf install -y nodejs
npm install -g pm2
mkdir -p /opt/fruitharvest
cd /opt/fruitharvest
git clone https://github.com/REPLACE_GITHUB_OWNER/REPLACE_GITHUB_REPO.git . || true
cd backend || exit 1
cat > .env <<ENVEOF
AWS_REGION=ap-southeast-1
IMAGE_BUCKET=

PORT=3000
ENVEOF
npm install
npm run init-db || true
pm2 start app.js --name fruitharvest-backend || pm2 restart fruitharvest-backend
pm2 save
pm2 startup systemd -u root --hp /root || true
